changesProposed.name: Einride

current.name: Einride
current.founder: Robert Falck, Filip Lilja, Linnéa Kornehed

verified.name: Einride
verified.description: Swedish transport company specializing in electric and autonomous trucks without driver cabs, remotely controlled by operators. The company provides an integrated platform connecting autonomous vehicles, electric freight transport, charging infrastructure, and AI-powered software.
verified.notes: Company went public via SPAC according to source 3. Wikipedia confirms 2016 founding and three named founders. The database entry listed 'Series C' stage, but source [3] indicates the company has gone public via SPAC merger. No specific financial figures (total_raised or valuation) could be verified from the provided sources.

changesProposed.name: Fervo Energy

verified.name: Fervo Energy
verified.description: A geothermal energy company that develops enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) using horizontal drilling techniques adapted from oil and gas. Operates Project Red in Nevada and is developing Cape Station in Utah.
verified.notes: Company went public in May 2026 based on newsroom entries dated May 17, 2026 in source [0]. Wikipedia source [2] lists company as 'Private' but this predates the IPO announcement. Most recent Series E funding of $462M occurred in November 2025 per source [2].

changesProposed.name: K2 Space

verified.name: K2 Space
verified.description: K2 Space designs and builds high-power satellite platforms for LEO, MEO, and GEO orbits. The company's Mega Class platform delivers 20kW of power with 3000kg payload mass capacity.
verified.notes: Database entry claims $360M raised and Series C stage, but sources only verify $110M raised (Series B as of February 2025). Founded year 2022 in database entry cannot be verified from provided sources. Mega Class platform specs from source [0]: 20kW power, 3000kg payload mass (not the 30kW mentioned in database entry).

changesProposed.name: Neura Robotics

verified.name: Neura Robotics
verified.description: German robotics company founded in 2019 that designs and manufactures cognitive and collaborative robots, including humanoid robots, with in-house development of AI, control software, sensor technology and mechanical components.
verified.notes: Series B funding of €120 million ($123.3 million) announced in January 2025 per source 2. Series C funding up to $1.4B announced in June 2026 per sources 3, 4, 5. Database entry valuation of €2.6B could not be verified from provided sources. Multiple funding rounds documented: July 2023 - $55M (source 2), January 2025 - €120M Series B (sources 1, 2), June 2026 - up to $1.4B Series C (sources 3, 4, 5).

changesProposed.name: SpaceX

verified.name: SpaceX
verified.description: American spaceflight, telecommunications, and artificial intelligence company founded by Elon Musk in 2002. The company develops reusable launch vehicles, spacecraft, and operates the Starlink satellite constellation.
verified.notes: Wikipedia states IPO occurred on June 12, 2026 raising $75 billion; TechCrunch source [3] reports final IPO amount grew to $85.7 billion when underwriters maxed out share purchases. Database entry claims $1.5T valuation and 'preparing for IPO' but sources confirm IPO already completed. Database valuation of $800B cannot be verified from sources.
